violations.text: Tomatoes were observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, tomatoes had been in the prep unit since the day prior. Tomatoes were voluntarily disposed. Tomatoes were observed double panned. Establishment must discontinue double panning food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (lobster) was observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. ROP lobster was observed held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Lobster was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
Hot water was not available at the handwashing sink in the prep area and the bathroom. Water must be at least 100 F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (lobster), labeled keep frozen, was observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. ROP lobster was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. ROP lobster was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
